events.event_description: U.S. Legation in Tirana established when the first Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary, Smith Ulysses Grant, presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Smith Ulysses Grant, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1922-09-22. Credentials presented: 1922-12-04. Left post on 1925-02-08.

events.event_description: Legation Tirana officially closed following Italian occupation of Tirana on April 8, 1939.

evidence.quote: Italian forces occupied Tirana on April 8, 1939. Legation Tirana was officially closed on September 16, 1939.

events.event_description: Embassy Tirana opened, re-establishing U.S. diplomatic presence in Albania after relations were resumed on March 15, 1991.

evidence.quote: The United States resumed diplomatic relations with Albania on March 15, 1991. Embassy Tirana opened on October 1, 1991.
